Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 188 

PRVDR_BASE _FAC_CCN_NUM 

LABEL: Provider Base Facility CMS Certification Number (CCN) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the CMS Certification Number (CCN). 

It is the CCN of the parent provider for IPPS hospitals, Critical Access Hospitals, and IPPS-Excluded 
hospitals with IPPS-excluded rehabilitation or psychiatric units or swing beds (as applicable). It is 
null/missing for all other
